page: Microsoft Azure DC96es_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance belonging to the DCEV6 server family. It is built on the x86_64 CPU architecture and features 96 dedicated vCPUs. The instance is provisioned with 384.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per vCPU. Virtualization is managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

This server type does not include any local storage, but it is designated as Premium Storage capable, allowing the attachment of external persistent storage volumes. It does not feature any graphics processing units and is provisioned with zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Due to the dedicated allocation of 96 vCPUs and 384.0 GB of RAM, this instance is designed for workloads requiring substantial parallel processing capabilities and a balanced memory footprint. Qualitative cost efficiency is aligned with high-density, enterprise-class resource allocation, offering a consolidated platform for large-scale deployments. Suitable workloads include enterprise databases, memory-intensive applications, and general-purpose enterprise workloads that leverage external premium storage.
description: Microsoft Azure DC96es_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance from the DCEV6 family, running on the x86_64 architecture under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 96 dedicated vCPUs and 384.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. The instance does not include local storage but is Premium Storage capable, allowing high-performance external disk attachments. It contains no onboard GPUs and does not come with complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Designed for high-density enterprise workloads, this server is suitable for large-scale databases, memory-intensive applications, and parallel processing tasks that require dedicated compute resources without the need for local physical disks.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC96es_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 96 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs, 384.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability, designed for demanding enterprise database and compute workloads.

tagline: A dedicated 96-vCPU virtual machine with 384 GB of RAM and premium external storage compatibility for enterprise workloads.

Powered by the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor
